description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ghcr.io/maxking/mailman-ci-runner:latest Docker image, defines the stages code, docs, and test, and sets global variables GIT_CEILING_DIRECTORIES=/builds, HOME=/builds, LC_ALL=C.UTF-8. Define a hidden job template .only-default that runs only on master, merge_requests, tags, and web. Add a code-diffcov job in the code stage that runs only on merge_requests and executes: git config --global --add safe.directory "/builds/${CI_PROJECT_NAMESPACE}/mailman", git config safe.directory, and tox -e py311-diffcov. Add a code-qa job extending .only-default in the code stage that runs tox -e qa, and a docs job extending .only-default in the docs stage that runs tox -e docs. Add three test jobs (test-mysql, test-postgres, test-sqlite) extending .only-default in the test stage, each parallelized over PYTHON_VER values 39,310,311,312,313 and running respectively tox -e "py$PYTHON_VER-nocov-mysql" with a mysql:5.6 service and MAILMAN_EXTRA_TESTING_CFG, MYSQL_DATABASE, MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD, MYSQL_USER, MYSQL_USER_PASSWORD variables; tox -e "py$PYTHON_VER-nocov-pg" with a postgres:latest service and MAILMAN_EXTRA_TESTING_CFG, POSTGRES_DB, POSTGRES_PASSWORD, POSTGRES_USER variables; and tox -e "py$PYTHON_VER-nocov" with no additional service.
